Subject: Apology for Payment Delay and Confirmation of Payment

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I would like to sincerely apologize for the delay in making the payment. Please be informed that the amount of $6,480 has now been successfully transferred to the ApoStar IBAN account. 

I have attached the payment receipt to this email for your reference. Kindly proceed with sending our ordered products once you have received and confirmed the payment.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
